title: ipomoea aurea
intro: Ipomoea aurea, also known as the golden morning-glory, is a flowering plant species within the Ipomoea genus, characterized by its golden or yellow trumpet-shaped flowers. The medicinal properties of Ipomoea aurea include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Ipomoea aurea is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin irritations, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
